name: Jalapeno Poppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the chiles for 10 minutes until softened.
2. Let cool, then cut a slit down one side of each chile.
3. Carefully scrape out seeds and veins using a small spoon.
4. Fill each chile with cheese.
5. Dip in milk, then coat in flour.
6. Beat the eggs, dip in egg mixture, then roll in seasoned breadcrumbs.
7. Deep-fry until golden brown (30 to 60 seconds).
8. Turn off heat when done and serve hot.
